case_title: GELLER, THOMAS VS LINUX PPC, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,875.00 FILED BY GELLER, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT LINUX PPC, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINUX PPC, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GELLER, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINUX PPC, INC. $1,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,930.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-04-1999, GRANTED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
